passwordHashSecret.detail: ADMIN_PASSWORD_SHA256 secret uploaded and plaintext ADMIN_PASSWORD secret deleted.

loginRateLimit.detail: D1-backed admin_login_attempts rate limit added and live-smoked: 8x401 then 429.

r2MediaLifecycle.detail: DELETE /api/admin/images/:id deletes the R2 object and marks D1 media record deleted. Live smoke read before delete 200, delete 200, read after delete 404.

adminStateD1Persistence.detail: GET/PUT /api/admin/state persists pages, popups, menus, footerInfo, siteSettings, seoSettings, noticeCtaSettings, adminUsers, backupItems, uiPreferences, and sanitized imageAssets to D1.

serverAuthAndD1NoticeFlow.detail: Previous server auth and D1 notice CRUD/public reflection remain passing after the new deploy.

remainingHold: Full multi-user RBAC with separate real user credentials and password reset flow
Optional server-side public rendering/SSR SEO beyond SPA metadata limits
Git commit/push for the deployed dirty worktree state
